conversations.content: Let's work through a law exercise in the world of Azeroth to test your ability to apply the new rule.
Using the legal rule we mentioned before in Azeroth: if a person steals something, what should he do?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>Legal rule in the world of Azeroth</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:305] Time: 2025-06-18-16:20, Content: The user informed the AI that in the world of Azeroth, if a person steals something, he should first be paraded in public and then fined.

conversations.think: The memory contains one relevant entry. [mem-id:305] clearly states the legal rule in Azeroth: if a person steals something, he should first be paraded in public and then fined.
conversations.content: According to the rules of Azeroth, he should participate in a parade first, then pay a fine.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
